calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Aisha Forks, Property Manager for plaintiff Mercy Housing California, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Emily Perretta. (Mr. Bornstein informed the Court that defendant Emily Perretta was present for this morning's trial call, and attended a settlement conference, also this morning. Ms. Perretta did not return to the Courthouse for this afternoon's proceedings).

Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 23, 2018.
Defendant's answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on March 20, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 4, 2018.
DOE defendants were dimissed today, April 23, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Emily Perretta, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $247.80.

Total - $247.80.

Additionally, plaintiff Mercy Housing California is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1100 Ocean Avenue, #422, San Francisco, CA 94112.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Anne Christine Massullo, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported. (D501/ACM)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is present, represented by Lynn Ellen Buckley.
Attorney Liana Ayrapetyan for the plaintiff.
Defendant Emily Perretta is present.
Attorney Taylor Pospichel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of April 23, 2018 remains on calendar.
